summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 3 endpoint configuration features. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/projects/:id/endpoints - saves selected endpoints to exposed_endpoints collection
POST /api/projects/:id/test-connection - tests connection with mock fallback mode
Enhanced GET /api/projects/:id - returns routeBreakdown, discoveredRouteCount, exposedEndpointCount, connectionTested
Frontend endpoints page loads and shows discovered routes in table
Summary bar shows correct green/yellow/red counts (11 Safe, 3 Need Review, 7 Blocked)
Green rows: green left border, enabled checkboxes, green risk dot
Yellow rows: yellow left border, expandable showing fields to strip
Red rows: red left border, disabled with lock icon, reduced opacity
Select All Safe button checks all green rows (11 endpoints selected)
Method badges: GET=green, POST=blue, PUT=yellow, DELETE=red colors
Rate limit column has editable number inputs
Auth config section: backend URL, login endpoint, service account credentials
Test Connection button calls API and shows success/failure result with mock fallback
Deploy button disabled until endpoints selected AND connection tested
Deploy button enabled after selecting endpoints and testing connection
Full flow: Dashboard -> Manage -> Endpoints page working correctly
